all.en: We are excited to invite you to the company annual team-building retreat this October.
all.zh: 我們很興奮邀請您參加今年十月舉辦的公司年度團建活動。

all.en: This year the retreat will be hosted at the Lakeside Pinewood Resort and Conference Center.
all.zh: 今年的團建活動將於湖畔松林度假村暨會議中心舉行。

all.en: The retreat is scheduled from Thursday, October eighth through Sunday, October eleventh.
all.zh: 團建活動訂於十月八日星期四至十月十一日星期日舉行。

all.en: The resort is located approximately two hours by chartered coach from our headquarters.
all.zh: 度假村距離總公司約兩小時的包車車程。

all.en: Buses will depart from the south parking lot at seven thirty on Thursday morning.
all.zh: 巴士將於星期四上午七點半自南側停車場發車。

all.en: Please arrive at least fifteen minutes early to assist with luggage loading.
all.zh: 請至少提早十五分鐘抵達，以協助行李裝載。

all.en: Each participant will receive a welcome packet upon arrival at the registration desk.
all.zh: 每位參與者抵達後將於報到櫃台領取歡迎禮包。

all.en: The packet contains your room key, schedule, name tag, and a branded notebook.
all.zh: 禮包內含您的房卡、行程表、名牌與公司品牌筆記本。

all.en: Accommodation is arranged in double rooms, so please indicate any roommate preference.
all.zh: 住宿安排為雙人房，請提前告知您的室友偏好。

all.en: The first evening features a casual welcome dinner by the lakefront pavilion.
all.zh: 第一天晚上將於湖畔涼亭舉辦輕鬆的歡迎晚宴。

all.en: Friday morning kicks off with leadership workshops led by external facilitators.
all.zh: 星期五上午將由外部講師主持領導力工作坊。

all.en: Afternoon activities include kayaking, hiking, and an outdoor problem-solving challenge.
all.zh: 下午活動包括划獨木舟、健行與戶外解題挑戰。

all.en: On Saturday, cross-functional teams will collaborate on a community service project.
all.zh: 星期六，各跨部門小組將合作執行一項社區服務專案。

all.en: We will partner with a local environmental group to clean and restore a nearby trail.
all.zh: 我們將與在地環保團體合作清理並修復附近的步道。

all.en: Saturday evening concludes with a formal awards dinner recognizing employee achievements.
all.zh: 星期六晚上將以正式頒獎晚宴作結，表揚員工的成就。

all.en: Awards will be presented in categories such as innovation, collaboration, and mentorship.
all.zh: 獎項類別包括創新、協作與輔導等。

all.en: Sunday morning offers optional wellness activities, including yoga and guided meditation.
all.zh: 星期日上午提供瑜伽與冥想等自由參加的健康活動。

all.en: Departure is scheduled for two o'clock on Sunday afternoon following a farewell brunch.
all.zh: 在星期日下午兩點的告別早午餐後將安排返程。

all.en: Please confirm your attendance through the online registration form by September fifteenth.
all.zh: 請於九月十五日前透過線上報名表確認您的出席。

all.en: Dietary restrictions and accessibility requirements can be noted within the same form.
all.zh: 飲食限制與無障礙需求可於同一份表單中註明。

all.en: All expenses, including transportation, lodging, and meals, are covered by the company.
all.zh: 包括交通、住宿與餐飲在內的所有費用均由公司負擔。

all.en: Family members are warmly invited to join the Saturday evening dinner at a discounted rate.
all.zh: 歡迎您的家人以優惠價參加星期六晚上的晚宴。

all.en: If you have questions, please contact the people experience team at any time.
all.zh: 如有任何疑問，請隨時聯繫員工體驗團隊。

all.en: We look forward to building meaningful connections and lasting memories together.
all.zh: 我們期待與您一起建立有意義的連結與美好的回憶。

all.en: A professional photographer will be on site to capture group memories and individual portraits throughout the weekend.
all.zh: 整個週末將有專業攝影師駐場，拍攝團體合影與個人肖像照。

all.en: All event photos will be uploaded to a private gallery accessible only to retreat participants within two weeks.
all.zh: 所有活動相片將於兩週內上傳至僅限參與者瀏覽的私人相簿。

all.en: Comfortable outdoor clothing and sturdy walking shoes are strongly recommended for all daytime activities.
all.zh: 強烈建議於日間活動時穿著舒適的戶外服裝與耐穿的步行鞋。

all.en: The resort provides complimentary kayaks, paddleboards, and bicycles for guests during designated recreation hours.
all.zh: 度假村於指定休閒時段免費提供獨木舟、立式槳板與自行車供賓客使用。

all.en: Quiet study rooms are available for employees who wish to balance retreat activities with focused work time.
all.zh: 度假村亦設有安靜的閱讀室，供希望兼顧活動與專注工作的員工使用。

all.en: An on-site nurse will be available throughout the retreat to assist with any minor medical concerns.
all.zh: 活動期間將有駐場護理人員提供協助，處理任何輕微的醫療需求。

all.en: Please bring any personal medications and notify the events coordinator of any allergies or health conditions.
all.zh: 請攜帶您個人服用的藥物，並向活動協調員告知任何過敏或健康狀況。

all.en: Carpooling options are available for employees who prefer to drive rather than take the chartered coach.
all.zh: 若您偏好自行開車而非搭乘包車，亦可選擇共乘方案。

all.en: Sustainability is a key focus of this year's retreat, including reusable water bottles and locally sourced meals.
all.zh: 永續是今年團建活動的核心重點，包括使用環保水瓶與在地食材製作餐點。

all.en: Following the retreat, a brief survey will be sent to gather feedback and improve future events.
all.zh: 活動結束後將發送簡短問卷以收集回饋，協助我們改進未來的活動。

all.en: Optional language exchange sessions will run each afternoon, pairing colleagues from different regions to encourage cross-cultural conversation.
all.zh: 每日下午將舉辦自由參加的語言交流時段，安排不同地區的同事配對，鼓勵跨文化交流。

all.en: A talent showcase will be held after dinner on Friday, inviting employees to share music, dance, or other creative performances.
all.zh: 星期五晚餐後將舉辦才藝表演，邀請員工分享音樂、舞蹈或其他創意演出。

all.en: Departure dates may be extended by one additional night for employees who wish to enjoy the resort facilities at their own expense.
all.zh: 若員工希望自費延長使用度假村設施，可於原定退房日後再多停留一晚。

all.en: Weather forecasts indicate mild temperatures, but light rain jackets and warm layers are recommended for early morning activities.
all.zh: 氣象預報顯示氣溫宜人，惟建議參與清晨活動時攜帶輕便雨衣與保暖衣物。

all.en: A small library and reading nook on the second floor offers a quiet space for personal reflection during downtime.
all.zh: 二樓設有小型圖書館與閱讀角，提供休息時段安靜的個人沉澱空間。

all.en: Employees are reminded to silence their work devices outside of designated focus hours to fully embrace the retreat experience.
all.zh: 提醒員工於指定專注時段外將工作裝置調為靜音，以充分體驗團建活動。

all.en: Sponsored childcare arrangements have been organized off-site for families with young children attending Saturday's dinner program.
all.zh: 為攜帶幼童參與星期六晚宴節目的家庭，已於場外安排贊助的托育服務。

all.en: Each participating department will design a banner that will be displayed in the main hall throughout the entire retreat.
all.zh: 每個參與部門將設計一面橫幅，於整個團建期間於主廳展示。

all.en: Highlights from previous retreats will be screened during the welcome dinner to celebrate our collective journey and shared memories.
all.zh: 歡迎晚宴期間將播放歷年團建活動精彩片段，慶賀我們共同的旅程與美好回憶。

all.en: We sincerely hope this retreat strengthens our culture of collaboration, creativity, and mutual respect across every level of the organization.
all.zh: 我們由衷期盼本次團建活動能強化組織內各階層協作、創意與相互尊重的文化。
